message.text:
**Files in `/Users/lucasqiu/Desktop/traceroot/cursor-sdk/capture`**

| Path | Role |
|------|------|
| `package.json` | npm package `traceroot-cursor-capture` (scripts, deps) |
| `package-lock.json` | Lockfile |
| `tsconfig.json` | TypeScript config |
| `node_modules/` | Installed dependencies (`@cursor/sdk`, dotenv, tsx, TypeScript, etc.) |
| `src/capture.ts` | Main capture script |

**Summary:** This folder is a small private TypeScript/npm project (`traceroot-cursor-capture`) that records **Cursor Agent SDK** events as JSON fixtures: it uses `@cursor/sdk` and `tsx` to run scenarios (quickstart, multiturn, cancelled, errored), logs stream/delta/step/status callbacks into `fixtures/*.json` relative to the parent `cursor-sdk`, and expects `CURSOR_API_KEY` (and optionally `CURSOR_MODEL`) in a parent `.env` — essentially a fixture generator for building or testing `@traceroot-ai/cursor` against real SDK surfaces.
